scripts.dev: concurrently -k "npm -C backend run dev" "npm -C frontend run dev"
scripts.build: npm -C backend run build && npm -C frontend run build
scripts.lint: npm -C backend run lint && npm -C frontend run lint
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); const targets=['node_modules','backend/node_modules','frontend/node_modules','backend/dist','frontend/dist']; for (const t of targets){ fs.rmSync(path.join(process.cwd(),t),{recursive:true,force:true}); } console.log('cleaned:',targets.join(', '));"
